title: eriophyllum caespitosum var. achilleoides
intro: Eriophyllum caespitosum var. achilleoides, also known as California fleabane or California woolly sunflower, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Eriophyllum caespitosum var. achilleoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
